---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user need or scenario isn't well served today?

## Proposed solution

How should this work? Sketch the API/UI/behaviour. Mention which layer it lands in (`domain/`, `services/`, `api/`, `streamlit_app/`).

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you weigh, and why is the proposed one preferable?

## Out of scope

Bound the change explicitly — what won't be touched in this issue.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, related work.
